title: Homikit 14cm Saucepan, Stainless Steel Tri-Ply Base Milk Pan with Glass Lid, Cooking Induction Pot Suitable for All Kitchen Cooktops, Healthy & Easy Clean - 1L
features: Healthy & Safe Cooking: Homikit sauce pan is built from stainless steel with uncoated design, won’t react with food or alter natural flavors, non-toxic and reliable for you and your family, Heavy-duty and well-balanced design that won’t warp or deform, Sturdy and anti-rust for daily use

Even & Fast Heating: Features tri-ply base construction, the interior consists of food-grade stainless steel for safe cooking, Aluminum core for excellent heat conduction, and sturdy stainless steel exterior suitable for induction-ready cooktops, gas, electric, ceramic and halogen

Ergonomic Design: Hollow handle is firmly secured with double rivets for a solid grip and comfortable transfer, Tempered glass lid allows you to monitor the cooking process without lifting the lid, Small steam vent effectively avoids overflowing, Classic straight side complements your modern kitchens

Versatile Use: 14cm/1L capacity, small size great to make recipes for 1-2 people, Whatever you’re warming milk, making sauces or soup, boiling eggs, cooking pasta, braising meat or veggies, melting chocolate, baking breads, reheating leftovers - our small pan is up to the tasks, A terrific choice for your friends and family

Effortless Cleanup: Sleek mirror finished surface for easier cleaning and dishwasher safe can save your busy time after meals, Oven-safe (glass lid cannot put into oven) and freezer-safe, Hanging hole at the end of the handle is convenient for storing and air drying
description: Product Description Homikit 14cm Saucepan With Glass Lid Homikit sauce pan is built from stainless steel with uncoated design, won’t react with food or alter natural flavors, non-toxic and reliable for you and your family. Enhance your cooking experience with our small milk pan, you can enjoy healthy and delicious meals every day with less hassle and more fun! Exquisite Craftsmanship Makes Our Cooking Pot Last For Years Previous page Next page Thick Triply Base Construction For Even And Efficient Heat Distribution Previous page Applicable For Various Stovetops Heavy duty base features a superior tri-ply design, premium stainless steel exterior ideal for induction-ready cooktops, gas, electric, ceramic, halogen… Superior Heat Conductivity Sturdy construction and healthy materials ensure safe cooking, even and fast heating and energy savings. Oven Safe For Baking (except lid) Always cook over medium-low heat, please note that only the pan can used in the oven, glass lid is not recommended. Cleaning Is A Breeze Hand-washing with warm soapy water and a soft sponge, if properly cared for, it can last for many years Dishwasher Safe Place safely in the dishwasher to save energy and time. After washing, towel dry immediately and store in a dry place. Next page Small Size Great To Make Recipes For 1-2 People Previous page Next page Whatever you’re warming, cooking, stewing, simmering, melting, boiling, reheating or baking, this versatile milk pot will serve you for years. Providing You A Smooth & Enjoyable Cooking Experience Previous page Next page Homikit 14cm Stainless Steel Saucepan With Glass Lid
